"Stretch, don't strain — long through the sides"
"Drive off the front heel to stand"

modifications.text: Shorten the step and reach to shoulder height.
Hold the bottom for a deeper hip-flexor stretch.
Limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: DB Chest Press
exercises.movement: Lie on the bench. Elbows come down to the ribs, then push the DBs away from the body to full extension.
cues: "Elbows about 45 degrees — not flared to the ears"
"Touch the rib line, press to lockout"
"Feet planted, low back gently down"
"Control down, drive up"

modifications.text: Lighten the bells or shorten the lower.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds or pause at the bottom.
Use a neutral grip and stop the elbows at bench height.

exercises.name: Down Dog with Foot Pedal
exercises.movement: From a plank position, pike the hips toward the ceiling. Drop one heel at a time toward the floor to stretch the hamstring and calf, pedaling the feet.
cues: "Hips high — push the floor away"
"Pedal slow — one heel sinks as the other bends"
"Long spine — let the head hang relaxed"
"Breathe into each side"

modifications.text: Bend both knees generously and shrink the pedal.
Hold each heel down 3-5 seconds.
Do it on fists or from the forearms.

exercises.name: TRX Seated Lat Pull
exercises.movement: Adjust the handles to the highest position. Sit on the floor with legs bent or straight. Bring your ribs to your hips and pull your body up toward the anchor point using the straps. Lower with control. Repeat.
cues: "Pull from the lats — drive the elbows to the floor"
"Ribs to hips — stay hollow, don't swing"
"Chest to the hands at the top"
"Lower slow — resist gravity all the way down"

modifications.text: Use leg assistance — push through the heels as you pull.
Straighten the legs fully and pull with no leg drive.
Reduce the range and keep tension comfortable.

exercises.name: DB Bent over Row alt.
exercises.movement: Feet hip-width, hips pushed back to the rear wall, back flat and parallel to the ground. Pull the DB on one side to the ribs, lower with control, and repeat on each side.
cues: "Hold the hinge — torso stays parallel"
"Row to the ribs, elbow past the back"
"Don't rotate — shoulders stay square"
"Slow lower, full hang at the bottom"

modifications.text: Stand taller in the hinge or support one hand on a bench.
Pause at the top of each row.
Brace the chest on an incline bench.

exercises.name: DB Rev. Lunge w/ Rotation Alt.
exercises.movement: Hold the DB at the chest, hands stacked. Step back with one foot into a reverse lunge and rotate the shoulders toward the front-leg side, then back to center. Stand and repeat on the other side.
cues: "Rotate over the front leg — hips stay square"
"Back knee drops straight down"
"Move from the ribs, not the arms"
"Re-center before you stand"

modifications.text: Shrink the rotation or go bodyweight.
Pause at the end of each rotation.
Shorten the lunge and limit depth.

exercises.name: KB American Swing
exercises.movement: KB on the floor slightly in front of you, feet shoulder-width. Slide the hips back, grab the handle, and hike it between the legs. Drive the hips forward and stand tall, pulling the bell overhead with straight arms, then drive it back between the legs.
cues: "Hips launch it — the arms just steer to the top"
"Finish with the bell stacked over your head, biceps by ears"
"Squeeze the glutes hard at the top — don't lean back"
"Let it fall and ride the hinge back"

modifications.text: Swing to chest height (Russian swing) instead of overhead.
Heavier bell — keep the overhead finish honest.
Cap the swing at chest height.

exercises.name: DB Man Maker
exercises.movement: Plank on the DBs. Row each side, lower the chest between the weights, and push back to plank. Jump forward into a squat, stand with a bicep curl, press to the ceiling, lower back down, and jump back to plank.
cues: "One piece at a time — row, row, push up, jump, curl, press"
"Hips stay quiet on the rows"
"Stand all the way up before the press"
"Pace it — smooth beats fast on this one"

modifications.text: Step instead of jump, and skip the push up.
Heavier DBs, unbroken reps.
Use hex DBs and keep wrists locked, or row from the knees.

exercises.name: DB Rev. Lunge to Step Up Alt.
exercises.movement: Hold the DB at your side. Step back into a reverse lunge, then step that same leg up onto the box and drive up. Step down with the opposite leg straight into its reverse lunge. Continue alternating.
cues: "Same leg lunges then steps up — one flowing rep"
"Drive through the heel on the box, not the floor leg"
"Stand tall at the top — full hip finish"
"Control the step down — don't drop off the box"

modifications.text: Split it — all lunges, then all step ups, no combo.
DBs in both hands.
Lower box, shallower lunge, pain-free range only.

exercises.name: KB 1.5 Stance Vertical Clean alt.
exercises.movement: In a hinged position with a staggered stance, both hands on the bell. Use the hips to drive the KB up to the chest, keeping both hands on it. Lower to the floor, switch the stance, and repeat.
cues: "Hips pop it up — the arms just catch"
"Front foot loaded, back foot kickstand"
"Bell stays close to the body on the way up"
"Flat back every time it goes down"

modifications.text: Even stance, lighter bell.
Pause at the chest before lowering.
Elevate the bell on a riser to shorten the pull.

exercises.name: TRX Y and T Pull
exercises.movement: Start with arms extended and feet under the anchors. Keeping the arms straight, pull to a T position and return, then pull to a Y position. Repeat.
cues: "Straight arms — raise, don't row"
"T goes wide, Y goes diagonal"
"Pinch the blades at the top of each letter"
"Plank body — no hip hinge to help"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to reduce the angle.
Walk the feet forward — go slow on the return.
Stick to the T and skip the Y.

exercises.name: Ball 3 Squat Press 3 Chest Slam
exercises.movement: Hold the med ball at the chest. Complete a squat, pressing the ball overhead as you stand — three total. Then hinge at the hips and complete three chest slams.
cues: "Three and three — count them out loud"
"Full press at the top of every squat"
"On the slams, throw through the floor"
"Reset your stance between the two moves"

modifications.text: Press to eye level and soften the slams.
Heavier ball, no rest between the 3s.
Skip the overhead — squat with the ball at the chest.

exercises.name: DB Chest Press to Pullover
exercises.movement: A DB in each hand, palms facing the feet. Complete a chest press, then rotate the hands to face one another and, keeping a slight bend in the elbows, extend the DBs overhead until the elbows reach the temples. Return over the chest and repeat the combo.
cues: "Press first, then pull the ceiling back over your head"
"Ribs down on the pullover — don't let the back arch"
"Soft elbows, long reach"
"Two moves, one rhythm"

modifications.text: Lighten the bells — the pullover sets the weight.
Slow the pullover phase to 3 seconds.
Shorten the overhead reach to a comfortable range.

exercises.name: DB Step Up
exercises.movement: Holding a DB in each hand, step the right foot onto the bench and drive up. Step down with the trail leg first. Repeat, then switch sides.
cues: "The box leg does all the work — no bouncing off the floor"
"Full foot on the bench"
"Stand tall at the top — finish the hip"
"Slow, controlled step down"

modifications.text: Lower box or bodyweight only.
Slow the descent or drive the trail knee up at the top.
Use a lower box and pain-free depth.

exercises.name: KB SL Deadlift
exercises.movement: Stand on the right leg holding the KB with both hands. Reach the left heel to the rear wall, keeping a straight line from ankle to ear. Squeeze the right glute to stand. Switch legs and repeat.
cues: "Reach the heel back, not down"
"One line — ankle to ear"
"Hips stay square to the floor"
"Squeeze the standing glute to rise"

modifications.text: Kickstand stance — back toe lightly down.
Slow the lower or hold the bottom.
Hold a rack or wall with the free hand.

exercises.name: KB Ballistic Row
exercises.movement: In a bent-over position, powerfully row the KB in line with your belly button, then quickly switch hands as the KB descends toward the floor. Repeat the hand switch at the top of each pull.
cues: "Row hard — make the bell float for the switch"
"Catch soft, flat back the whole time"
"Switch at the top, not on the way down"
"Hips hold still — power comes from the back"

modifications.text: Row and switch on the floor between reps — no air catch.
Heavier bell, faster cadence.
Standard alternating rows without the ballistic switch.

exercises.name: Ball Rainbow Slam
exercises.movement: Start with the med ball just outside the pinky toe. Pick it up, make an arc overhead, and slam it just outside the opposite pinky toe. Repeat back and forth.
cues: "Draw the rainbow — foot to foot over the top"
"Rotate from the hips, pivot the back foot"
"Slam down and across — full follow-through"
"Flat back on every pickup"

modifications.text: Shrink the arc and slam softer.
Heavier ball, continuous rhythm.
Lighter ball, smaller range, slower tempo.

exercises.name: DB Bent Over Row Knee on Bench
exercises.movement: Left knee and hand on the bench, back flat, right foot on the floor. DB in the right hand with a neutral grip, pull the DB from under the shoulder up toward the hip, then return. Switch sides.
cues: "Flat back — torso parallel to the bench"
"Pull toward the hip pocket, not the armpit"
"Elbow tight to the body"
"No twisting — hips stay square"

modifications.text: Lighten the DB and shorten the pull.
Pause 1-2 seconds at the top.
Keep the supported setup and avoid rounding.

exercises.name: Fitband Crossover Y Raise
exercises.movement: Standing at the opposite end of the Fitbands, cross them and hold a handle in each hand. Pull the arms up and out to create a 'Y' at the top, then control back to the start and repeat.
cues: "Cross the bands — pull up and out to the Y"
"Straight arms, thumbs up"
"Squeeze the blades down and back at the top"
"Slow return — don't let the bands snap you down"

modifications.text: Step toward the anchor to reduce tension.
Step back, pause at the top of the Y.
Raise to shoulder height instead of a full Y.

exercises.name: KB Offset Rack Cossack Squat
exercises.movement: Holding the KB in the front rack on one side, step wide and complete a Cossack squat — sitting into one hip with the other leg straight. Switch sides when it's time to switch.
cues: "Sit into one hip — the other leg stays long, toes up"
"Bell racked tight — don't let it pull you over"
"Chest tall as you sink"
"Push through the whole foot to come back up"

modifications.text: Bodyweight Cossack, holding a rack for balance.
Deeper range or pause at the bottom.
Limit depth — a half-range Cossack still counts.

exercises.name: Ball Push Ups
exercises.movement: Starting in a high plank with one hand on the ball, complete a push up. Drop the knees to the ground to modify intensity.
cues: "Stack the shoulder over the ball — own the wobble"
"Chest drops level between the hands"
"Squeeze the glutes — one straight line"
"Push through the ball just as hard as the floor"

modifications.text: Drop to the knees, or both hands on the floor with the ball put aside.
Roll the ball to the other hand between reps.
Both hands on the ball, neutral wrists.

exercises.name: Ball Skater hops w/ Pause
exercises.movement: Standing on the left foot with the right leg lifted, hop to the side and land on the right leg, the left foot sweeping behind to balance. Let the ball follow the outside leg as you jump side to side. Pause after each hop. Repeat the opposite way.
cues: "Stick every landing — pause and own it"
"Push off the outside edge, land soft"
"Ball swings with you — let it lead the rhythm"
"Stay low — hips back like a skater"

modifications.text: Step side to side instead of hopping, tap the toe behind.
Bigger hops, longer pause on one leg.
Small lateral steps only — no jumping.

exercises.name: DB Single Leg Deadlift
exercises.movement: Stand on the right leg holding the DB with both hands. Reach the left heel to the rear wall, keeping a straight line from ankle to ear. Squeeze the right glute to stand. Switch legs and repeat.
cues: "Reach the heel back, not down"
"One line — ankle to ear"
"Hips square to the floor the whole way"
"Squeeze the standing glute to rise"

modifications.text: Kickstand stance — back toe lightly down.
Slow the lower or pause at the bottom.
Hold a rack or wall with the free hand.

exercises.name: DB Pullover to Chest Press to Sit Up on bench
exercises.movement: Lie on the bench holding a DB in each hand over the chest. Extend and lower the bells overhead keeping the ribs down, pull back to the start, lower to chest height and press back up, then complete a sit up. Repeat the sequence.
cues: "Three moves — pullover, press, sit up — in order"
"Ribs down on the pullover, no arching"
"Press to full lockout before the sit up"
"Use the bells as a counterweight on the way up"

modifications.text: Lighter bells, or skip the sit up and keep the press-pullover combo.
Slow each phase to a 3-second tempo.
Shorten the pullover range and bend the knees up for the sit up.

exercises.name: DB 1 arm Thruster Alt.
exercises.movement: Hold the DBs in the front rack position. Sit back into a squat, chest tall, then stand up quickly and drive one DB to the ceiling. Return to the start and repeat on the opposite arm.
cues: "One squat, one press — the legs launch the bell"
"Alternate arms — the other bell stays racked"
"Stand all the way up before the press finishes"
"Chest tall in the bottom of the squat"

modifications.text: One bell only, or split the squat and press into two moves.
Heavier bells or a pause in the squat.
Press to a comfortable height instead of lockout.

exercises.name: Fitband Hip Thrusts
exercises.movement: Upper back on the bench, legs bent, band attached low on the bench and across the hips. Drive the heels into the ground and squeeze the glutes to lift the hips as high as possible. Lower with control.
cues: "Drive through the heels"
"Squeeze hard at the top — full lockout against the band"
"Ribs down — no low-back arch to finish"
"Chin tucked, eyes over the knees"

modifications.text: Remove the band and thrust bodyweight.
Pause 2-3 seconds at the top.
Reduce the range — lift only to a neutral hip line.

exercises.name: KB 3 Position SL RDL Alt.
exercises.movement: Holding a KB in each hand, complete a kickstand RDL, then a lateral kickstand RDL, then a front-support RDL. Repeat the sequence on the other side.
cues: "Three angles, same hinge — hips back every time"
"Flat back through every position"
"The kickstand toe is for balance, not power"
"Squeeze the working glute to stand"

modifications.text: One bell, or stick to the standard kickstand RDL.
Slow each lower to 3 seconds.
Shorten the hinge and lighten the bells.

exercises.name: Ball Boulder Over
exercises.movement: Stand with the ball in front of you. Squat to grab it with a flat back, stand and bring it to one shoulder, then roll it over the shoulder. Repeat on the other side.
cues: "Squat it up — legs lift, back stays flat"
"Hug it to the shoulder, then let it roll"
"Stand tall through the finish"
"Alternate shoulders every rep"

modifications.text: Lift to the chest and skip the roll-over.
Heavier ball, continuous reps.
Lighter ball, perfect flat-back setup every rep.

exercises.name: KB Anterior Good Morning
exercises.movement: Hold the KB against the chest, feet hip-width. Bend at the hips, then pull the hips through to stand. Drive the hips back to the start and repeat.
cues: "Hips back first — chest follows"
"Hug the bell tight to the chest"
"Flat back — proud chest at the bottom"
"Squeeze the glutes through to stand"

modifications.text: Reduce depth or go bodyweight, hands at chest.
Slow the descent to 3 seconds.
Shorten the hinge and keep the bell light.

exercises.name: KB alt. Woodchop to Halo
exercises.movement: Hold the KB by the horns. Extend it to the left hip pocket, raise it to the right ear and around the head (halo), then extend to the right hip pocket and halo from the left ear. Repeat the pattern.
cues: "Chop to the pocket, circle the head, chop to the other pocket"
"Keep the bell close on the halo — tight circle"
"Rotate from the ribs on the chop"
"Slow and smooth — this is a control drill"

modifications.text: Split it — all chops, then all halos.
Heavier bell, slower circles.
Skip the halo — chop pocket to pocket only.

exercises.name: DB Incline Chest Press x2reps alt.
exercises.movement: Set the bench to incline. Complete 2 reps on the first side, then 2 reps on the opposite side, switching back and forth every 2 reps.
cues: "Two and two — count the switch"
"The resting bell stays up at lockout"
"Elbow about 45 degrees on the press"
"Brace — the single-arm work pulls you sideways"

modifications.text: Press both arms together.
Hold the resting bell at the bottom instead of lockout.
Use a neutral grip and shorten the lower.

exercises.name: Fitband Alt. Bicep Curl
exercises.movement: Stand tall with a Fitband handle in each hand at the sides, palms forward. Curl one arm at a time up to the shoulder and slowly lower. Switch arms and repeat. ⚠️ Set up as shown in video.
cues: "Elbows pinned to the ribs"
"Curl all the way up, lower all the way down"
"Slow on the way down — fight the band"
"No swinging — stand like a pillar"

modifications.text: Step toward the anchor to reduce tension.
Step back, pause at the top of each curl.
Shorten the range — stop before full extension.

exercises.name: Ball Slam to Squat Jump
exercises.movement: Perform a med ball slam. Before picking the ball up to slam again, perform a squat jump. Repeat the slam-then-jump sequence.
cues: "Slam from the hips — full reach overhead first"
"Jump straight up — land soft"
"Flat back on every pickup"
"Find the rhythm — slam, jump, repeat"

modifications.text: Swap the jump for a bodyweight squat.
Heavier ball, continuous pace.
No jump — stand tall out of the squat instead.

exercises.name: DB 1 Arm Clean w/ Step
exercises.movement: Feet shoulder-width, DB in the right hand in front of the shins. Drive the feet into the floor and thrust the hips forward, bringing the DB just above the shoulder while simultaneously tapping the opposite foot to the bench top. Return the DB and foot to the floor. Repeat on the second side.
cues: "Hips snap the bell up — the arm just guides"
"Tap the bench as the bell lands — one beat"
"Catch soft at the shoulder"
"Flat back every time you reach down"

modifications.text: Clean without the foot tap.
Heavier bell or quicker cycle.
Skip the tap and keep both feet planted.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.movement: Holding the DBs by the sides, raise them out to the sides under control, then return slowly. Repeat.
cues: "Lead with the elbows — pour out the pitchers"
"Stop at shoulder height"
"Slow down — the lower is half the rep"
"No shrugging — shoulders stay away from the ears"

modifications.text: Lighten the DBs or raise to 45 degrees.
Pause 2 seconds at the top.
Raise slightly forward of the body, thumbs up.

exercises.name: Band Fire Hydrants on Bench
exercises.movement: With the Fitband clipped around the knees, set up in a tabletop position on the bench. Raise one leg out to the side against the band, lower with control, complete the reps, then switch sides.
cues: "Lift the knee out and up — like a dog at a hydrant"
"Hips stay square — don't roll to lift higher"
"Push into the band at the top"
"Slow lower — keep tension the whole set"

modifications.text: Remove the band.
Pause 2 seconds at the top of each lift.
Drop to the forearms in tabletop.

exercises.name: KB 2arm Gunslinger Swing
exercises.movement: Holding a KB at each side, hinge at the hips and swing the bells to chest height with a slight bend in the elbows. Swing back to the sides and repeat.
cues: "Both bells swing together — hips drive them"
"Hinge, don't squat"
"Bells float to chest height — no muscling"
"Stand tall and squeeze at the top"

modifications.text: One bell with two hands — standard swing.
Heavier bells — keep the float honest.
Lighten the bells and shorten the backswing.

exercises.name: TRX Ab Tuck to Pike
exercises.movement: Feet secured in the TRX handles, holding a high plank with the core engaged. Pull the knees to the chest and extend back to the start, then drive the hips into the air as far as possible and lower back to plank with control. Repeat the combo.
cues: "Tuck, extend, then pike — two moves, one set"
"Hips high on the pike — legs stay long"
"Shoulders stacked over the wrists throughout"
"Control the return — no crashing into plank"

modifications.text: Tucks only — add the pike when ready.
Slow both moves to a 3-second tempo.
Floor-based tucks with feet on a slider.

exercises.name: DB Racked Side Lunge
exercises.movement: With the DBs racked on the shoulders, complete a side lunge, alternating each side.
cues: "Step wide — sit into one hip"
"The straight leg stays long, toes forward"
"Rack stays tall — don't tip over the working leg"
"Push through the whole foot to return"

modifications.text: Bodyweight side lunge, hands at the chest.
Pause at the bottom of each lunge.
Shorten the step and limit depth.

exercises.name: Fitband Rotational Row 1arm
exercises.movement: Facing the bench, slightly hinged at the hips, holding a Fitband in each hand. Alternate rows while rotating the torso through each pull, returning to the start between sides.
cues: "Row and rotate together — pull through the ribs"
"Elbow drives back, hips stay low"
"Control the return — don't let the band yank you"
"Square up fully between reps"

modifications.text: Row without the rotation.
Step back for more tension, pause at the top.
Stand taller and shrink the rotation.

exercises.name: DB Sumo Deadlift
exercises.movement: Feet wider than the shoulders, toes out. Sit the hips back with a flat back and pick up the weight by squeezing the glutes to stand tall. Send the hips back to return to the start.
cues: "Knees out over the toes as you sit back"
"Flat back, proud chest"
"Squeeze the glutes to stand — no back yank"
"The weight travels straight up the middle"

modifications.text: Elevate the weight on a riser.
Pause at the bottom or slow the lower.
Reduce depth and lighten the load.

exercises.name: TRX I-Pull
exercises.movement: Start with arms extended and feet under the anchors. Keeping the arms straight, pull the arms straight up to an 'I' position overhead, return, and repeat.
cues: "Straight arms all the way to the I"
"Finish with biceps by the ears"
"Body stays a plank — no hip drive"
"Lower slow — resist the straps"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to reduce the angle.
Walk the feet forward — small steps, big difference.
Pull to a Y instead of a full overhead I.

exercises.name: KB Split Squat 1arm
exercises.movement: KB in one hand, take a long step back with the same-side leg. Drop the back knee directly under the hip without touching the ground, stand back up, and repeat.
cues: "Bell on the back-leg side — stay tall against it"
"Drop straight down, knee under hip"
"Don't let the bell pull you sideways"
"Front heel drives the stand"

modifications.text: Hold the bell at the chest with both hands.
Pause at the bottom of each rep.
Limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: Plank with Knee to Elbow
exercises.movement: Holding a plank — elevate the hands if needed — bring the same-side knee to the elbow, return to plank, and repeat on the other side.
cues: "Knee to elbow — exhale as it comes in"
"Hips stay level — no piking to reach"
"Push the floor away the whole time"
"Slow and deliberate beats fast and sloppy"

modifications.text: Elevate the hands on the bench.
Pause 2 seconds at the elbow.
Drop to a forearm plank.

exercises.name: Fitband Row to External Rotation
exercises.movement: Facing the FitBench holding the Fitbands, pull the elbows up to shoulder height, rotate the hands up until level with the face, return to shoulder height, and back to the start. ⚠️ Set up bands as shown in video.
cues: "Row high, then rotate — two beats per rep"
"Elbows stay at shoulder height through the rotation"
"Knuckles to the ceiling at the top"
"Reverse it slow — rotation, then row, back down"

modifications.text: Step toward the anchor and shrink the rotation.
Pause at the top of the rotation.
Keep the row only — skip the rotation.

exercises.name: Low Plank Squeeze on Ball
exercises.movement: With the hands on the ball, lower into a low plank. Squeeze the ball with the hands and keep tension through the shoulder blades.
cues: "Crush the ball — squeeze the whole hold"
"One straight line — glutes tight"
"Push up out of the shoulders — no sagging chest"
"Breathe — don't trade air for tension"

modifications.text: Drop the knees, keep the squeeze.
Extend the hold or lift one foot at a time.
Standard forearm plank on the floor.

exercises.name: Sprinter Burpee
exercises.movement: Complete a burpee. When you hop up at the top, hit a sprinter stance — arms and legs in opposite drive position — then drop back down and repeat.
cues: "Finish every burpee in the sprinter pose — knee up, arms split"
"Chest to the floor at the bottom"
"Stick the stance — balance for a beat"
"Alternate the lead knee each rep"

modifications.text: Step back and in, skip the push up.
Add a tuck jump before the sprinter stance.
Step through every phase — no jumping.

exercises.name: DB Rev Lunge to Swing
exercises.movement: Complete a reverse lunge with the DB in the hand of the leg that steps back. As you come up, swing the DB up to chest height, switch hands, and complete the reverse lunge on the other side. Repeat.
cues: "Lunge, swing, switch — one flowing pattern"
"The hips power the swing, not the arm"
"Catch the bell soft at the top of the float"
"Stand tall before the next step back"

modifications.text: Lunge and swing separately — switch hands on the ground.
Heavier bell, continuous rhythm.
Shorten the lunge and limit depth.

exercises.name: Split Squat Jump
exercises.movement: Split stance, drop the back knee almost to the ground, torso tall, then explode up through the heel, jumping into the air. Land soft. Switch feet every jump or at the halfway point.
cues: "Explode up — full extension in the air"
"Land soft, right back into the lunge"
"Chest tall — don't fold forward on the landing"
"Switch clean — feet trade places mid-air"

modifications.text: Split squat without the jump, or small hops.
Drive the arms and jump higher every rep.
No jumping — alternating reverse lunges instead.

exercises.name: TRX Mid Row Neutral Grip
exercises.movement: Start with arms extended and feet under the anchor, neutral grip. Pull the handles to the ribs, return, and repeat.
cues: "Palms face each other — pull to the ribs"
"Elbows graze the body on the pull"
"Squeeze the blades at the top"
"Plank body — full extension at the bottom"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to stand more upright.
Walk the feet forward or pause at the top.
Reduce the range to a comfortable pull.

exercises.name: TRX Anti- Rotation Press
exercises.movement: Stand sideways to the anchor with the hands at the middle of the chest. Push the hands straight out, keeping the body from rotating or dropping, then bring them back to the chest and repeat.
cues: "Press out slow — the straps want to spin you"
"Squeeze the glutes — lock the hips square"
"The further out the hands, the harder it fights"
"Breathe out as you press"

modifications.text: Step toward the anchor to reduce the pull.
Step away, pause 3 seconds at full extension.
Shorten the press-out range.

exercises.name: DB Box Squat
exercises.movement: Holding a DB in the front rack position, stand feet hip-width at the end of the bench. Control the body down into a squat to sit on the bench, then stand up and repeat.
cues: "Control the sit — don't just drop onto the bench"
"Chest tall the whole way down"
"Tap and go — light touch, not a rest"
"Drive through the heels to stand"

modifications.text: Use a higher surface or go bodyweight.
Pause on the bench for 2 seconds before standing.
Limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: Popcorn Squat
exercises.movement: Feet hip-width, drop into a squat and add a small jump, staying down in the lower range. Keep holding the low squat stance and 'pop' continuously without standing all the way up.
cues: "Stay low — live in the bottom of the squat"
"Small, springy jumps — quick off the floor"
"Chest tall, weight in your heels"
"Soft landings — knees track over your toes"

modifications.text: Skip the jump — pulse in the bottom of the squat instead.
Drop lower or hold the position longer between pops.
Limit depth to a pain-free range and remove the jump.

exercises.name: TRX Atomic Push Up
exercises.movement: Starting in a high plank with feet in the stirrups, complete a push up. At the top, tuck the knees toward the chest, then extend back out. Repeat the combo.
cues: "Push up first, then tuck — two distinct moves"
"Hips stay level through both phases"
"Full extension before the next tuck"
"Strong plank the entire combo"

modifications.text: Push up from the knees, tuck from the floor.
Slow the tuck-and-extend tempo.
Push up on fists or a slight incline.

exercises.name: KB Row In Lunge
exercises.movement: Step back into a lunge position with a soft bend in the front leg and the back leg straight, leaning slightly forward with the free hand on the front thigh. Extend the KB toward the floor, then pull it toward the chest and back down. Alternate and complete on both sides.
cues: "Hold the lunge — the lower body is frozen"
"Row to the ribs, elbow tight"
"Flat back — chest just above the front thigh"
"Long arm at the bottom of every rep"

modifications.text: Rest the working hand on the thigh between rows.
Pause at the top of each row.
Stand taller in the lean and lighten the bell.

exercises.name: TRX Bicep Clutch
exercises.movement: Face the anchor point, palms holding the handles facing each other, arms fully extended. Pull yourself toward your hands, bringing palms toward the armpits, elbows out but not above shoulder height. Clutch and hold, then release and repeat.
cues: "Pull the body to the hands, not the hands to the body"
"Elbows stay below the shoulders"
"Squeeze and hold at the top"
"Control the release — don't just fall back"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to reduce the angle.
Walk the feet forward or extend the hold.
Shorten the range and skip the hold.

exercises.name: DB Single Arm Deadlift
exercises.movement: Feet hip-width, a DB in one hand held in front of the thighs, knees soft. Back straight, reach the butt to the rear wall as deep as comfortable, then drive through the heels to stand.
cues: "Hips back — the bell just rides down"
"Flat back, proud chest"
"Squeeze the glutes to stand"
"Keep the bell close to the leg"

modifications.text: Reduce depth or use both hands on one DB.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds.
Shorten the range and lighten the load.

exercises.name: DB Incline Chest Fly Alt.
exercises.movement: Lie on the incline bench, feet on the floor, holding the DBs above the chest with a slight bend in the elbows. Drop one arm at a time, opening it as though hugging the ceiling, then return and repeat on the opposite side.
cues: "One arm flies while the other holds steady"
"Soft elbows the whole way"
"Open wide, but don't overstretch the shoulder"
"Control the return — squeeze at the top"

modifications.text: Lighten the DBs or shorten the range.
Both arms together for a bigger stretch load.
Reduce the fly depth to a comfortable range.

exercises.name: Fitband Triceps Extension
exercises.movement: Hands start overhead. Bend at the elbow as the hands come down behind the head. Press the hands away, extending the arms back to start, while maintaining a strong core position. ⚠️ Use the same setup as the video.
cues: "Elbows point to the ceiling, stay tight to the head"
"Only the forearms move"
"Full extension at the top"
"Brace the core — don't let the band pull you"

modifications.text: Step toward the anchor to reduce tension.
Step back, pause at full extension.
Reduce range — stop before full overhead.

exercises.name: TRX Crossing Balance
exercises.movement: Begin feet hip-width, holding the TRX handles at 90 degrees. Step backward, crossing the knee behind the other leg, knee almost to the ground, torso upright. Return, switch legs, and repeat.
cues: "Cross behind — not straight back"
"Torso stays upright, don't lean into the straps"
"Knee hovers, doesn't slam down"
"Balance through the whole rep"

modifications.text: Shorten the cross-step and use the straps for more support.
Reduce hand support and slow the tempo.
Limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: Bent Knee Alt. Leg Raise
exercises.movement: Lying flat, hands under the glutes if needed, start with both legs straight up. Lower one leg at a time with a bent knee just before it taps down, then raise and switch sides, keeping the core engaged.
cues: "Low back glued down the whole set"
"Bend the knee as it lowers — shortens the lever"
"Hover, don't touch, before switching"
"Keep the working rhythm slow and controlled"

modifications.text: Bend both knees more to shorten the range further.
Straighten the legs more or add a pause at the bottom.
Shrink the range — keep the legs higher.

exercises.name: DB Crossbody Reverse Lunge 1arm
exercises.movement: DB in one hand. Step back with that same leg into a reverse lunge and reach the DB across the body toward the front foot's ankle. As you stand, return the DB to your side. Complete reps on one side, then switch.
cues: "Reach across the body — feel the stretch through the hip"
"Front knee over the ankle, back knee drops straight down"
"Drive through the front heel to stand"
"Stay tall through the spine as you reach"

modifications.text: Reach toward the knee instead of the ankle, or use no weight.

"Squeeze the shoulder blade at the top"
"Don't twist — keep both hips square to the bench"

modifications.text: Lighten the DB and reduce range to keep the back flat.
Pause 1–2 seconds at the top of each row.
Keep the supported position and avoid rounding to reach lower.

exercises.name: Elevated Bicycle
exercises.movement: Lie flat on the bench, hands behind the head. Reach the right elbow to the left knee, return, then reach the left elbow to the right knee, return. Repeat.
cues: "Rotate from the ribs, not just the arms"
"Extend the resting leg long"
"Slow and controlled — no yanking the neck"
"Full rotation each side"

modifications.text: Slow the pace or keep the resting leg bent.
Straighten the resting leg lower to the ground.
Keep the legs higher and shrink the range.

exercises.name: KB Cossack Squat Low Load
exercises.movement: Wide stance, toes straight ahead, holding a light weight in each hand at the sides. Sit the butt back to the right side, drive through the right heel to stand, then repeat on the left.
cues: "Sit into one hip, other leg stays long, toes up"
"Chest tall as you sink"
"Push through the whole foot to come back up"
"Light load — this one's about the range"

modifications.text: Bodyweight only, holding a rack for balance.
Add a pause at the bottom.
Limit depth — a half-range Cossack still counts.

exercises.name: Res. Band Overhead Press
exercises.movement: Stand on the band, feet hip-width, and press the band overhead with both hands. Lower with control, keeping the core and back straight.
cues: "Press straight up — full lockout"
"Brace the core the whole rep"
"No arching to finish the press"
"Control the lower — resist the band"

modifications.text: Shorten the band stance or use a lighter band.
Widen the stance for more tension.
Press to a comfortable height instead of lockout.

exercises.name: Ball Rainbow Slam in Iso Split Squat
exercises.movement: Standing in an isolated split squat stance, start with the med ball at the chest and complete a rainbow slam on either side of the front leg, alternating sides.
cues: "Hold the split stance — the legs don't move"
"Draw the rainbow — arc from side to side"
"Rotate from the ribs on the slam"
"Stay low through the whole set"

modifications.text: Shrink the arc and soften the slam.
Heavier ball, continuous rhythm.
Shorten the split stance and limit depth.

exercises.name: DB Overhead Curtsy Lunge
exercises.movement: Begin feet hip-width, DB in the overhead position. Step backward with the same-side leg, crossing the knee behind the other, knee touching the ground, torso upright. Return and repeat.
cues: "Arm stays locked overhead — don't let it drift"
"Step behind and across on the curtsy"
"Torso stays tall through the whole rep"
"Drive through the front heel to stand"

modifications.text: Hold the DB at the chest instead of overhead.
Deeper curtsy or pause at the bottom.
Shorten the step and limit depth.

exercises.name: Triangle Push Up
exercises.movement: Start in a high plank with the hands in a triangle shape under the chest, body in a straight line. Slowly lower the chest close to the floor, then push the floor away to come back up.
cues: "Triangle hands stay directly under the chest"
"Elbows track close to the ribs"
"One straight line — glutes tight"
"Slow lower — this targets the triceps"

modifications.text: Drop to the knees, same hand position.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds or elevate the feet.
Use push-up handles or fists.

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch on Bench
exercises.movement: Lie flat on the bench, hands behind the head. Reach the right elbow to the left knee, return, then reach the left elbow to the right knee, return. Repeat.
cues: "Rotate from the ribs, not just the arms"
"Extend the resting leg long"
"Slow and controlled — no yanking the neck"
"Full rotation each side"

modifications.text: Slow the pace or keep the resting leg bent.
Straighten the resting leg lower to the ground.
Keep the legs higher and shrink the range.

exercises.name: Res. Band Overhead Squat
exercises.movement: Stand on the band, feet hip-width, placing the band across the front of the shoulders. Sit into a squat, keeping the arms straight. Stand up.
cues: "Arms stay locked straight overhead"
"Sit between the heels, chest tall"
"Brace the core against the band tension"
"Full stand to reset"

modifications.text: Reduce squat depth.
Pause at the bottom of each squat.
Hold the band at a lower, comfortable height.

exercises.name: TRX Mtn. Climber
exercises.movement: High plank position, feet in the TRX straps, hands under shoulders. Maintain a tight core and bring the right knee toward the chest, keeping the left leg extended. Switch legs quickly, bringing the left knee toward the chest and extending the right. Alternate.
cues: "Quick knees, but hips stay level"
"Shoulders stacked over the wrists"
"Keep the pace controlled — don't bounce"
"Strong plank the entire set"

modifications.text: Slow the cadence significantly.
Speed up or add a small hop between switches.
Floor-based mountain climbers instead.

exercises.name: DB Goblet Reverse Lunge Alt.
exercises.movement: Holding the DB in the goblet position, reverse lunge, stand, then repeat the reverse lunge on the other side.
cues: "Back knee drops straight down"
"Chest tall — don't fold over the bell"
"Drive through the front heel to stand"
"Alternate sides evenly"

modifications.text: Use bodyweight only or reduce depth.
Pause at the bottom of each lunge.
Shorten the step and limit depth.

exercises.name: KB Deadstop Swing
exercises.movement: KB on the floor slightly in front of you, feet shoulder-width. Slide the hips back, grab the handle, and hike it between the legs. Drive the hips forward and stand tall, letting the bell float, then drive it back between the legs to the start position, stop, and repeat.
cues: "Full stop between reps — reset the hinge"
"Hips snap it up — the arms just guide"
"Flat back on every hike"
"Control the stop, don't just let it crash"

modifications.text: Lighter bell, shorter backswing.
Heavier bell, pause longer at the dead stop.
Reduce depth and lighten the load.

exercises.name: DB Chest Press 1arm Alt.
exercises.movement: Lie on the bench, both DBs starting away from the body with arms fully extended. Lower one DB at a time, elbow down to the ribs, push it away from the body, then switch sides.
cues: "One arm presses while the other holds at lockout"
"Elbow about 45 degrees on the press"
"Brace — the single-arm work pulls you sideways"
"Control down, drive up"

modifications.text: Press both arms together.
Hold the resting arm at the bottom instead of lockout.
Use a neutral grip and shorten the lower.

exercises.name: Res. Band Good Morning
exercises.movement: Stand on the band, feet hip-width, and loop it around the back of the neck. Bend at the hips, then pull the hips through to stand. Drive the hips back to the start and repeat.
cues: "Hips back first — chest follows"
"Flat back — proud chest at the bottom"
"Squeeze the glutes through to stand"
"Keep the band snug on the neck the whole time"

modifications.text: Reduce depth or use a lighter band.
Slow the descent to 3 seconds.
Shorten the hinge range.

exercises.name: TRX Biceps Clutch
exercises.movement: Face the anchor point, palms holding the handles facing each other, arms fully extended. Pull yourself toward your hands, bringing palms toward the armpits, elbows out but not above shoulder height. Clutch and hold, then release and repeat.
cues: "Pull the body to the hands, not the hands to the body"
"Elbows stay below the shoulders"
"Squeeze and hold at the top"
"Control the release — don't just fall back"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to reduce the angle.
Walk the feet forward or extend the hold.
Shorten the range and skip the hold.

exercises.name: DB Zottman Curl
exercises.movement: Stand tall, a DB in each hand, palms facing up. Curl to the shoulder, then flip the palms over and lower back down to the hips. Repeat.
cues: "Curl palms up, lower palms down"
"The flip happens right at the top"
"Slow the lower — that's the forearm work"
"Elbows stay pinned to the ribs"

modifications.text: Lighten the DBs or skip the flip on some reps.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds after every flip.
Shorten the range at the top.

exercises.name: Bench Hops
exercises.movement: Begin with hands on the far end of the bench, hips over the bench, feet together. Jump both feet over and across the bench, landing softly. Alternate side to side.
cues: "Jump the whole body over — feet lead"
"Land soft and quiet"
"Hands stay planted the whole set"
"Quick and light — bounce right back over"

modifications.text: Step over instead of jumping.
Speed up the pace.
Use a lower support surface or fists.

exercises.name: Ab Tuck
exercises.movement: Lie on the bench, extend the legs and lean back, then pull the knees to the chest and reach for the ankles. Repeat.
cues: "Lean back, then crunch the knees in"
"Reach for the ankles at the top"
"Control the lean — don't just flop back"
"Exhale as the knees come in"

modifications.text: Shrink the lean-back range.
Lean back further or add a pause at the tuck.
Keep the lean shallow and controlled.

exercises.name: TRX Balance Lunge
exercises.movement: Begin feet hip-width, holding the TRX handles at 90 degrees. Step backward, knee almost to the ground, torso upright. Return, switch legs, and repeat.
cues: "Torso stays upright — don't lean into the straps"
"Back knee hovers, doesn't slam down"
"Front heel drives the stand"
"Balance through the whole rep"

modifications.text: Use the straps for more support.
Reduce hand support and slow the tempo.
Limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: TRX Skaters
exercises.movement: Hold the TRX handles with arms extended, feet shoulder-width apart. Lunge backward and slightly behind the front leg, knee almost to the ground. Drive through the front leg to stand and hop laterally to the other leg. Repeat on the other side.
cues: "Lunge back, then hop laterally"
"Land soft on the new leg"
"Straps help balance, not do the work"
"Stay low between hops"

modifications.text: Step laterally instead of hopping.
Bigger hops, deeper lunge.
Small lateral steps only — no hopping.

exercises.name: DB Chest Fly to Chest Press
exercises.movement: Lying on the bench, complete a chest fly, then a chest press, alternating the two movements in one combo.
cues: "Fly first, then press — same rhythm every time"
"Soft elbows on the fly, don't lock out"
"Ribs down, low back gently on the bench"

modifications.text: Lighten the DBs — the fly is the limiter, size the weight to it.
Slow both lowers to 3 seconds.
Shorten the fly range — keep the elbows above chest level.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Step Up Alt.
exercises.movement: Stand feet hip-width behind the bench. Step up onto the bench keeping the chest high, then step back down. Repeat on the other side. Option to hold a DB in each hand.
cues: "The box leg does all the work"
"Full foot on the bench"
"Stand tall at the top — finish the hip"
"Slow, controlled step down"

modifications.text: Lower box height.
Add DBs at the sides.
Use a lower box and pain-free depth.

exercises.name: TRX Alligator Pull alt.
exercises.movement: Face the anchor, hands in front, arms straight. The right arm goes overhead while the left arm pulls down. Return, flip the hands, and repeat.
cues: "One arm up, one arm down — opposite directions"
"Straight arms — pull from the shoulders"
"Flip cleanly between reps"
"Body stays square to the anchor"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to reduce the angle.
Walk the feet forward for more resistance.
Shorten the range near the top.

exercises.name: TRX Triceps Kick Back
exercises.movement: Facing away from the anchor, hinge slightly at the hips. Extend the arms straight back behind you, squeezing the triceps, then bend the elbows to return. Repeat.
cues: "Elbows stay high and still — only the forearm moves"
"Full extension straight back"
"Hold the hinge the whole set"
"Squeeze at the back of every rep"

Deepen the hinge for more tension.
Shorten the range at full extension.

exercises.name: DB 2arm Long Stance RDL
exercises.movement: In a stance slightly longer than a split stance, hold one DB in each hand. Keep the front knee soft, back straight, and reach the butt to the rear wall as deep as comfortable with hands on either side of the front leg. Stand up and squeeze the glutes at the top. Repeat.
cues: "Long stance — front knee stays soft"
"Flat back the whole way down"
"Bells travel close along the front leg"
"Squeeze the glutes to stand"

modifications.text: Reduce depth or shorten the stance.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds.
Shorten the range and lighten the load.

exercises.name: DB Skull Crusher
exercises.movement: Lie flat on the bench, DBs held with palms facing each other. Keeping the elbows in, lower the DBs to the forehead, then press away.
cues: "Elbows stay pointed at the ceiling"
"Lower to the forehead, not the chest"
"Press to full lockout"
"Control the lower — this is a triceps stretch"

modifications.text: Lighten the DBs or shorten the range.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds.
Stop the lower higher, above the forehead.

exercises.name: Sit Up on Bench
exercises.movement: Lie flat on the bench, hands to either side of the head, complete a sit up. Lie back down with control and repeat.
cues: "Lead with the chest, not the neck"
"Full sit up — reach tall at the top"
"Slow lower — don't just flop back"

Hold a light weight at the chest.
Shorten the range and go slow.

exercises.name: Fitband Anti- Rotation Press
exercises.movement: Start standing sideways with the hands in the middle of the chest, holding the FitBand handles. Push the hand straight out, keeping the body from rotating, then bring the hands back to the chest and repeat.

Step away, pause 3 seconds at full extension.
Shorten the press-out range.

exercises.name: DB Reverse Lunge with Asymmetrical Load
exercises.movement: DB in the right hand. Complete a reverse lunge stepping back with the right leg, stand back to the top, and repeat. Switch hands and legs.
cues: "Uneven load — brace the core against the pull"
"Back knee drops straight down"
"Chest tall through the whole rep"
"Drive through the front heel to stand"

modifications.text: Lighten the DB or hold it at the chest instead.
Increase the load or pause at the bottom.
Shorten the step and limit depth.

exercises.name: DB Pullover

modifications.text: Shorten the overhead range.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds.
Reduce the overhead reach to a comfortable range.

Hinge at the hips to take the KB between the legs, then snap the hips forward, swinging the KB and stepping forward simultaneously. Step the leg back and let the KB fall back between the legs again, moving together. Repeat.

"Hips drive the swing, not the arm"
"Flat back on every hinge"

Bigger step, heavier bell.
Lighten the bell and shorten the backswing.

exercises.name: Res. Band Split Stance Row Alt.

"Squeeze the glutes to stand"

Slow the lower to 3 seconds.
Shorten the range and lighten the load.

exercises.name: DB Pullover Hips Off Bench

cues: "Ribs down — don't let the back arch"

"Feel the stretch through the lats"
"Pull back with the lats, not just the arms"

modifications.text: Shorten the overhead range.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds.
Reduce the overhead reach to a comfortable range.

exercises.name: DB Chest Press on Bench

Limit depth to a pain-free range.

"Small range — control beats height"
"Grip the bench for stability"

Slow the tempo and pause at the top.
Reduce the hip-lift range.

Pause at the top of the pull.
Reduce depth and lighten the load.

exercises.name: DB Rear Delt Raise
exercises.movement: Bend at the knees slightly and lean forward from the hips, maintaining a flat back. Lift the dumbbells up and out to the side, pause at the top, then slowly bring them back to the start.

"Lead with the elbows out to the sides"
"Pause and squeeze at the top"
"Slow lower — resist gravity"

modifications.text: Lighten the DBs or stand taller in the hinge.
Pause 2 seconds at the top.
Support the chest on an incline bench instead.

exercises.name: Skull Crushers on Bench
exercises.movement: Lie flat on the bench, DBs held with palms facing each other. Keeping the elbows in, lower the DBs to the forehead, then press away.
cues: "Elbows stay pointed at the ceiling"
"Lower to the forehead, not the chest"
"Press to full lockout"
"Control the lower — this is a triceps stretch"

modifications.text: Lighten the DBs or shorten the range.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds.
Stop the lower higher, above the forehead.

exercises.name: DB Hammer Curls

cues: "Elbows pinned to the ribs"
"Neutral grip the whole rep — palms stay facing in"
"Slow the lower — fight gravity"

modifications.text: Lighten the DBs.
Pause at the top or slow the lower further.
Shorten the range at the top.

"Squeeze the chest to bring the hands together"

Lean further forward for more resistance.
Shorten the open-wide range.

exercises.name: KB Deadlift
exercises.movement: Stand with feet hip-width, weight in each hand held in front of the thighs, knees soft. Back straight, reach the butt to the rear wall as deep as comfortable, then stand tall.

"Flat back, proud chest"
"Push the floor away to stand"
"Squeeze the glutes at the top"

modifications.text: Reduce depth — stop where the back stays flat.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds.
Shorten the range and lighten the load.

exercises.name: DB Chest Press x2 to Pullover

Slow the pullover phase to 3 seconds.
Shorten the overhead reach.

exercises.name: AB Tuck on Bench
exercises.movement: Lie on the bench, extend the legs and lean back, then pull the knees to the chest and reach for the ankles. Repeat.
cues: "Lean back, then crunch the knees in"
"Reach for the ankles at the top"
"Control the lean — don't just flop back"
"Exhale as the knees come in"

modifications.text: Shrink the lean-back range.
Lean back further or add a pause at the tuck.
Keep the lean shallow and controlled.

exercises.name: KB Figure 8 Alt.

cues: "Athletic stance — knees soft the whole time"
"Smooth handoffs behind and between the legs"
"Keep the pattern flowing, not choppy"

modifications.text: Slow the pattern and use a lighter bell.
Speed up or use a heavier bell.
Stand taller and shrink the reach.

exercises.name: Res. Band Hammer Curl
exercises.movement: Stand tall on the resistance band, palms facing each other holding the band in each hand. Curl to the shoulder and back down to the hips. Repeat.
cues: "Neutral grip the whole rep"
"Elbows pinned to the ribs"
"Slow the lower — fight the band"
"Stand tall, no swinging"

modifications.text: Shorten the band or stand closer to the anchor.
Stand on more band for extra tension.
Shorten the range at the top.

exercises.name: DB Thruster 1 arm
exercises.movement: Hold the DB in the front rack position. Sit back into a squat, chest tall. Drive the heels down and thrust the hips forward to standing, driving the weight to the ceiling. Return to start.
cues: "Squat first, then punch it overhead"
"Full squat before the drive"
"Stand tall before the press finishes"

Heavier DB or a pause in the squat.
Press to a comfortable height instead of lockout.

exercises.name: Reverse Sit Up on Bench
exercises.movement: Lie on the bench, grab the bench above the head. Legs as straight as possible, reach the feet to the ceiling, letting the hips come off the bench slightly, and repeat.
cues: "Hips lift, legs stay long"
"Small range — control beats height"
"Grip the bench for stability"
"Exhale as the hips lift"

exercises.name: KB Goblet Reverse Lunge
exercises.movement: Holding the KB in the goblet position, reverse lunge, stand, then repeat the reverse lunge on the other side.
cues: "Back knee drops straight down"
"Chest tall — don't fold over the bell"
"Drive through the front heel to stand"
"Alternate sides evenly"

modifications.text: Use bodyweight only or reduce depth.
Pause at the bottom of each lunge.
Shorten the step and limit depth.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Lunge
exercises.movement: Stand feet hip-width with DBs at the sides. Step laterally to one side and sit the hips back into an imaginary chair, torso upright. Drive through the heel to stand, switch legs, and repeat.

"Straight leg stays long, toes forward"
"Chest tall the whole way"
"Drive through the whole foot to stand"

modifications.text: Reduce depth or go bodyweight.
Pause at the bottom of each lunge.
Limit depth and keep the knee tracking behind the toes.

exercises.name: Inchworm Push Up

"Full push up at the bottom of the walk"

"Chest tall through the descent"

modifications.text: Skip the jump — step to the other leg instead.
Rely less on the straps for support.
Limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: TRX Mid Row Underhand
exercises.movement: Start with arms extended, feet under the anchor, underhand grip with thumbs up. Pull the handles to the ribs, return, and repeat.
cues: "Palms up — pull to the ribs"
"Elbows graze the ribs on the way back"
"Squeeze the blades — don't just bend the arms"
"Long arms at the bottom of every rep"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to stand more upright.
Walk the feet forward or pause at the top.
Switch to a neutral grip.

exercises.name: Ball Toe Taps
exercises.movement: Med ball toe taps, alternating feet with every tap.
cues: "Light, quick taps — stay on the balls of the feet"
"Keep the chest tall"
"Alternate feet evenly"
"Find a rhythm and hold it"

modifications.text: Slow the pace.
Speed up the tap cadence.
Hold a nearby rack for support.

exercises.name: Push Up Sphinx
exercises.movement: Start in a low plank, elbows stacked under the shoulders, fingers spread out. Push from the toes, shifting the weight forward while holding a tight plank, then back. Repeat.
cues: "Small shift — forward and back, not a full push up"
"Elbows stay stacked under the shoulders"
"Hips stay level the entire time"
"Brace like you're about to be poked"

modifications.text: Drop to the knees, same forward-back shift.
Increase the shift distance or slow the tempo.
Stay on the forearms the entire set.

exercises.name: Ball Chop and Lift
exercises.movement: Hold the med ball at the chest, squat down reaching the ball in front of one shin. As you stand, lift the ball overhead to the opposing side. Return to holding at the chest and repeat the combo on the other side.
cues: "Squat and reach low, then lift high and across"
"Rotate from the hips on the lift"
"Flat back on the reach down"
"Alternate sides evenly"

modifications.text: Shrink the range and lighten the ball.
Heavier ball, deeper squat.
Slow the tempo and reduce the reach.

exercises.name: DB Front Squat
exercises.movement: Stand feet hip-width, DBs on the shoulders with elbows in front of the body. Sit back, chest tall, as deep as possible. Stand squeezing the glutes, repeat.
cues: "Elbows up — keep the rack tight"
"Sit into it — chest tall the whole way down"
"Drive through the heels, squeeze at the top"
"Own the bottom — don't bounce out of it"

modifications.text: Reduce depth or go bodyweight.
Pause 2 seconds at the bottom.
Limit depth to a pain-free range, toes slightly out.

exercises.name: DB Fire Hydrant on Bench
exercises.movement: In a tabletop position, raise one leg out to the side with a DB in the crook of the knee. Lower with control, complete the reps, then switch sides.
cues: "Lift the knee out and up — like a dog at a hydrant"
"Hips stay square — don't roll to lift higher"
"Hold the DB with the knee, don't let it slip"
"Slow lower — keep tension the whole set"

modifications.text: Remove the DB.
Pause 2 seconds at the top of each lift.
Drop to the forearms in tabletop.

exercises.name: Bench Dip
exercises.movement: Sit on the floor, place the hands on the bench behind you, and use the arms to press away from the bench.
cues: "Elbows point straight back, not out"
"Lower with control — feel the triceps stretch"
"Press through the palms to rise"
"Keep the hips close to the bench"

modifications.text: Bend the knees more and keep the feet close.
Straighten the legs or elevate the feet.
Shorten the dip range.

exercises.name: KB 2 arm Sumo Deadlift
exercises.movement: Feet wider than the shoulders, toes out. Sit the hips back with a flat back and pick up the KBs by squeezing the glutes to stand tall. Send the hips back to return.
cues: "Knees out over the toes as you sit back"
"Flat back, proud chest"
"Squeeze the glutes to stand — no back yank"
"Bells travel straight up the middle"

modifications.text: Elevate the bells on a riser.
Pause at the bottom or slow the lower.
Reduce depth and lighten the load.

exercises.name: KB 2arm Row in Lunge
exercises.movement: Step back into a lunge position with a soft bend in the front leg and the back leg straight, leaning slightly forward with the free hand on the front thigh. Extend the KBs toward the floor, then pull them toward the chest and back down.
cues: "Hold the lunge — the lower body is frozen"
"Row both bells to the chest together"
"Flat back — chest just above the front thigh"
"Long arms at the bottom of every rep"

modifications.text: Row one arm at a time, resting the other hand on the thigh.
Pause at the top of each row.
Stand taller in the lean and lighten the bells.

exercises.name: TRX Biceps Curls
exercises.movement: Hold the TRX handles, palms up, at shoulder height, body slightly angled away from the anchor. Keeping the elbows at shoulder height, curl the handles to the shoulders, then slowly extend the arms to complete.
cues: "Elbows stay high and still"
"Curl all the way, extend all the way"
"Lean into the straps for the resistance"
"Slow on the extend — control the straps"

modifications.text: Stand more upright to reduce resistance.
Lean back further for more load.
Shorten the range at full extension.
